query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 2, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Coca-Cola 350ml' as name, 'Refrigerante Coca-Cola lata 350ml' as description, 7.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Coca-Cola 600ml', 'Refrigerante Coca-Cola garrafa 600ml', 10.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Suco Natural', 'Suco natural de laranja, limão ou maracujá (400ml)', 12.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Milkshake', 'Milkshake cremoso de chocolate, morango ou ovomaltine (400ml)', 18.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Bebidas' AND c.establishmentId = 2;
